rag_rules: Keep type-scope AGREE blocks in component type owners, and keep implementation-scope AGREE blocks in component implementation owners.
If inserting into an implementation owner, place the annex after existing subcomponents and connections so structural AADL remains valid.
generic_rules: Make the smallest possible edit inside the chosen owner body and preserve all existing architectural declarations unchanged.
Respect owner scope boundaries; do not move type-level content into an implementation owner or implementation-only content into a type owner.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Insert a complete `annex agree {** ... **};` block inside the owner definition before its closing `end`.
Preserve surrounding section order and formatting well enough for the enclosing AADL structure to remain parseable.
anti_patterns: Do not place an AGREE annex outside any component or component implementation body.
Do not rename, delete, or reorder existing features, subcomponents, connections, or properties just to add the annex.
irrelevant_topics: Expression-level AGREE operator and temporal syntax details
Scalar declaration type selection such as int/real/bool
Using AADL property names or unit tokens as AGREE variables
